/usr/bin/ar qc libhud-service.a "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/hud-service_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/Application.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/ApplicationImpl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/ApplicationList.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/ApplicationListImpl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/Collector.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/DBusMenuCollector.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/DBusMenuWindowCollector.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/Factory.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/GMenuCollector.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/GMenuWindowCollector.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/HardCodedSearchSettings.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/HudService.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/HudServiceImpl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/Item.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/ItemStore.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/QGSettingsSearchSettings.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/Query.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/QueryImpl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/Result.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/SearchSettings.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/SignalHandler.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/SqliteUsageTracker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/UsageTracker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/Voice.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/VoiceImpl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/Window.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/WindowImpl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/WindowContext.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/WindowContextImpl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/HudAdaptor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/QueryAdaptor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/ApplicationAdaptor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-service.dir/AppmenuRegistrarInterface.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libhud-service.a
